title: Status 5m LED Colour Changing Tape Kit | 30 Watt Colour Changing | 16 Colour Modes | 4 Transition Modes | Remote Control with 5m Range | SL5MCCTKP1B2
features: VERSATILE LIGHTING OPTIONS: Transform your space with 16 vibrant colour modes and 4 smooth transition effects. Whether you’re setting the mood for a relaxing evening, hosting a party, or enhancing a room's decor, this LED tape offers a range of lighting options to suit every occasion.

EASY TO CONTROL: Take full command of your lighting with the included remote control, featuring a 5-metre range. Effortlessly change colours, adjust brightness, or switch between transitions without having to get up, making it a convenient and user-friendly addition to your home.

ENERGY-EFFICIENT DESIGN: With just 30 watts of power, this LED tape provides a bright and stunning visual effect without significantly impacting your energy bills. It’s an ideal choice for those looking to upgrade their lighting while keeping energy consumption low.

FLEXIBLE AND EASY TO INSTALL: The 5-metre LED tape can be trimmed to fit your specific needs, making it perfect for under-cabinet lighting, outlining furniture, or adding a creative touch to walls and ceilings. The self-adhesive backing ensures a quick and hassle-free installation.

DURABLE AND LONG-LASTING: Built to provide reliable performance, this LED tape boasts a remarkable 20,000-hour lifespan. Whether it’s used for daily home decor or special occasions, it delivers consistent brightness and is designed to stand the test of time, making it a cost-effective lighting solution.
description: Product Description 30w - Status - LED Colour Changing - 5m Tape Kit - 16 Colour Modes / 4 Transition Modes - Remote Control - 5m Range - 1 pk glossy box Box Contains 1 x Crystalite colour changing tape and remote control
